_comment: Rules: require_any (PhD/doctoral, whole-word) + anchor_any (must name an animal/livestock, whole-word) + include (a field term, substring). Auto-handles plants (plant-only has no animal word) and postdocs ('doctoral' != 'postdoctoral'). Edit here, commit, Actions -> Run workflow.

feeds.label: GA: livestock genomics
feeds.note: Query: PhD livestock genomics (drop quotes to widen)

feeds.label: GA: species genomics
feeds.note: Query: PhD genomics cattle OR sheep OR dairy OR pig

feeds.label: GA: AU/NZ animal genetics
feeds.note: Query: PhD animal genetics Australia OR New Zealand

feeds.label: GA: bioinformatics livestock
feeds.note: Query: PhD bioinformatics livestock OR cattle
